respawn = 3;
respawnDelay = 10;
onLoadName = "Defend Petrovice";
onLoadMission = "Soviet forces are attacking the town. Hold your positions!";
author = "Synthetic Fixture Suite";
briefingName = "01 - Defend";

class Header {
    gameType = Coop;
    minPlayers = 1;
    maxPlayers = 12;
};

class Params {
    class TimeOfDay {
        title = "Time of Day";
        values[] = {6, 12, 18, 22};
        texts[] = {"Dawn", "Noon", "Dusk", "Night"};
        default = 12;
    };
    class Weather {
        title = "Weather Conditions";
        values[] = {0, 0.5, 1};
        texts[] = {"Clear", "Overcast", "Rain"};
        default = 0;
    };
    class Difficulty {
        title = "Enemy Skill";
        values[] = {0, 1, 2};
        texts[] = {"Recruit", "Veteran", "Elite"};
        default = 1;
    };
};

class CfgRadio {
    class Contact {
        name = "";
        sound[] = {"radio\contact.ogg", db+5, 1.0};
        title = "Contact!";
    };
    class Regroup {
        name = "";
        sound[] = {"radio\regroup.ogg", db+5, 1.0};
        title = "Regroup at rally point";
    };
};

class CfgMusic {
    tracks[] = {};
    class Intro {
        name = "Mission Intro";
        sound[] = {"music\intro.ogg", db+10, 1.0};
    };
    class Action {
        name = "Action Theme";
        sound[] = {"music\action.ogg", db+5, 1.0};
    };
};

class CfgBriefing {
    class West {
        title = "US Forces";
        description = "Your squad must defend Petrovice from Soviet attack. Hold the town center and prevent enemy from capturing the radio station.";
    };
};
